title: Claude Code just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates using Claude Code to build client websites with an embedded CMS that allows non-technical clients to edit content without touching code. The workflow integrates design reference extraction, single-shot website generation, MongoDB for data storage, and deployment via Vercel to create scalable, client-editable web applications.
